items.title: Framework Self-Improvement
items.description: Tasks for the framework to improve itself using its own workflow.

items.title: Real-time Updates
items.description: UI should update instantly when CLI/Agent makes changes.

items.title: Implement WebSockets
items.description: Add Socket.io to server and client for live events.

items.title: Fix Mobile Layout
items.description: Kanban board is squashed on small screens.

items.title: Card Detail View
items.description: Allows the user to double-click a card to view its full details in a modal or side panel.

items.title: Drill-down Kanban View
items.description: Implement a switch to toggle between 'Exploded Kanban' (all items mixed) and 'Drill-down Kanban' (level-by-level navigation from Epics to Stories to Tasks).

items.title: Split Brain Database Issue
items.description: Database inconsistency between MCP server and API server. Items created via MCP are not reflecting in the UI. Absolute pathing needs to be strictly enforced across all components.

items.title: Treat Bugs as Top-level Items
items.description: In Drill-down mode, Bugs should be visible at the root level alongside Epics.

items.title: Rename Epics to Top Level in Drill-down
items.description: Rename the 'Epics' breadcrumb/tag to 'Top Level' in Drill-down mode since it now contains Bugs as well.

items.title: Reliability & Workflow Enforcement
items.description: Enforce a workflow where every code change is linked to an item in the AgenFK database.

items.title: Enforce Task ID in Commits
items.description: Implement a Git pre-commit hook that validates the commit message for a Task ID or automatically creates a placeholder task.

items.title: Proactive Task Enforcement (Pre-Action Guard)
items.description: Implement a mechanism that guarantees a task exists BEFORE any code change is made. The framework should require an active task context for all write operations.

items.title: Implement Workflow Gatekeeper Tool
items.description: Add a 'workflow_gatekeeper' tool to the MCP server that validates task existence before changes. Update core logic to track 'Active Task Context'.

items.title: Intelligent Workflow Automation
items.description: Automate the detection of item types (Epic, Story, Task, Bug) and enforcement of implementation plans for Epics.

items.title: Epic Plan Preview in UI
items.description: Display and preview Markdown implementation plans when opening an Epic card.

items.title: Item Type Detection & Prompting Strategy
items.description: Implementation of the detection logic and prompt engineering to guide the agent in categorizing user requests and asking for details.

items.title: Core Type Update for Epic Plans
items.description: Add implementationPlan field to Epic/BaseItem in @agenfk/core.

items.title: MCP Tool: analyze_request
items.description: Add analyze_request tool to MCP server to guide the agent in categorizing requests.

items.title: UI Markdown Support
items.description: Install and configure react-markdown in the UI package.

items.title: Fix redundant double header in UI
items.description: The UI is displaying two headers (one from App.tsx and one from KanbanBoard.tsx). Remove the redundant header in App.tsx.

items.title: Item Type Filtering
items.description: Add a dropdown filter in the header to filter the Kanban board by item type (Epic, Story, Task, Bug). Works in both Exploded and Drill-down modes.

items.title: Streamlined Onboarding (agenfk)
items.description: Implement a streamlined bootstrapping experience under the name 'agenfk'. This includes a single command to initialize a project, set up MCP, and start services.

items.title: Create agenfk CLI wrapper
items.description: Create a root-level 'agenfk' shell script or bin that wraps the CLI and provides a simple 'bootstrap' command.

items.title: Single Command Workflow (agenfk up)
items.description: Consolidate bootstrap and start into a single command for the agenfk CLI.

items.title: AgenFK Skills Integration
items.description: Expose the framework's capabilities and workflows as loadable agent skills using the SKILLS.md pattern.

items.title: Framework as a Skill (SKILLS.md)
items.description: Expose agenfk workflow as a loadable skill via SKILLS.md.

items.title: Create SKILLS.md definition
items.description: Create the SKILLS.md file defining the AgenFK Engineering workflow.

items.title: Simplify Kanban Navigation (Remove View Toggle)
items.description: Simplify the UI by removing the Exploded/Drill-down toggle. Make Top-Level the default view and add an explicit 'Drill Down' action button to Epic and Story cards.

items.title: Comply with SKILL.md formatting
items.description: Adapt SKILLS.md to follow the official OpenCode SKILL.md formatting requirements (YAML frontmatter, specific naming rules).

items.title: Implement Subitems tab UI and logic
items.description: Modify CardDetailModal to support tabs and display subitems. Pass the full items list to the modal from KanbanBoard.

items.title: Fix MCP Tool Schemas for Implementation Plans
items.description: The MCP tools (create_item, update_item) are missing the implementationPlan field in their input schemas, forcing a fallback to curl. Fix the schemas to ensure full framework compliance.

items.title: Verification Story
items.description: Verify that stories appear correctly when drilling down into an Epic.

items.title: Enhanced Subitems View in Kanban UI
items.description: Improve the subitems view within the Kanban UI to provide better visibility and interaction with child items.

items.title: Refine Root Level Filtering Logic
items.description: Update Kanban filtering logic to show all items without parent IDs at the root Level, regardless of their type (Epic, Story, Task, Bug).

items.title: Intelligent Status Synchronization
items.description: Automate status synchronization between child items and their parents across the hierarchy.
items.implementationPlan:
# Intelligent Status Synchronization Plan

## Objective
Implement automatic status propagation up the hierarchy chain (Task -> Story -> Epic).

## Rules
- **Activation**: If a child moves to `IN_PROGRESS`, propagate `IN_PROGRESS` to the parent.
- **Completion**: If ALL children of a parent are `DONE`, move the parent to `DONE`.
- **Recursion**: Apply these rules recursively up to the top-level items.

## Implementation Steps
1. Add a recursive `syncParentStatus` helper in the API server.
2. Hook into the `updateItem` logic.
3. Ensure WebSocket broadcasts are triggered for every automated change.

items.title: Status Sync Logic Implementation
items.description: Implement the recursive status sync logic in the API server.

items.title: Develop Recursive Sync Function
items.description: Develop the recursive function in server.ts to handle parent status updates based on child changes.

items.title: Propagation Test Task
items.description: A test task to verify status propagation.

2) Incomplete story modal data when clicking subitems.
3) Focus subitems tab when navigating back to parent.

items.title: Mandatory Syntax Verification Workflow
items.description: Enhance the agenfk workflow to require syntax/lint checks before marking items as DONE. Implement automatic transition to REVIEW status and fallback to IN_PROGRESS on failure.
items.implementationPlan:
# Mandatory Verification Workflow Plan

## Objective
Enforce code quality by requiring automated checks before a task can transition from `IN_PROGRESS` to `DONE`.

## Workflow Rules
1. **Change Detection**: The agent must detect if changes were made to `packages/server`, `packages/cli`, `packages/storage-json`, or `packages/ui`.
2. **Mandatory Check**: 
   - Backend: `npm run build` in root or specific backend package.
   - Frontend: `npm run build --workspace packages/ui`.
3. **Status Transition**:
   - Instead of moving to `DONE`, items with code changes MUST move to `REVIEW` first.
   - The agent (or a CI/CD process) performs the check.
   - SUCCESS -> Move to `DONE`.
   - FAILURE -> Move back to `IN_PROGRESS` and report errors.

## Implementation Steps
1. Update `SKILL.md` with the new protocol.
2. Add a `verify_changes` tool to the MCP server that executes the appropriate build/lint commands based on changed files.
3. Update `workflow_gatekeeper` or add a new `status_guard` to enforce the `REVIEW` step.

items.implementationPlan:
# Framework Global Rename Plan

## Objective
Update all branding and technical references to use 'AgenFK' instead of 'AgenFK'.

## Target Mappings
- `agenfk` -> `agenfk`
- `AgenFK` -> `AgenFK`
- `AGENFK` -> `AGENFK`

## Implementation Steps
1. Search and replace in all source files (`packages/*`, `root`).
2. Update package names in `package.json` files.
3. Update configuration file names and directory names (e.g., `.agenfk` -> `.agenfk`).
4. Update environment variables.
5. Update Opencode MCP configuration.
6. Verify with a full build.

items.description: Perform the search and replace operation for the global rename.

items.description: Replace all occurrences of agenfk/AgenFK/AGENFK in source code and UI.

items.title: Archival System
items.description: Implement an 'Archived' status with recursive behavior, default exclusion from lists, and UI support for collapsed viewing and bulk archival.
items.implementationPlan:
# Archival System Implementation Plan

## Objective
Add a robust archival system to AgenFK to declutter the workspace while preserving data and relationships.

## Requirements
- New `ARCHIVED` status.
- Items track their `previousStatus`.
- Recursive archival: archiving a parent archives all descendants.
- Recursive restoration: unarchiving restores the original state tree.
- UI: Collapsed column at the end of the board.
- UI: Bulk archive for columns.
- API/MCP: Exclude archived items by default.

## Tasks
1. **Core & Storage**: Add `ARCHIVED` status and `previousStatus` field.
2. **API Logic**: Implement recursive archival/unarchival logic.
3. **API Logic**: Filter archived items from default `list_items` query.
4. **UI**: Implement the collapsed "Archived" column.
5. **UI**: Add archive/unarchive actions to cards and headers.

items.title: Dashboard shows "Loading..." for Current Project after agenfk up
items.description:
After running `agenfk up`, the dashboard header shows the current project name as "Loading..." indefinitely.

Root cause: `selectedProjectId` is initialized from `localStorage.getItem('agenfk_project_id')` (KanbanBoard.tsx:39). After projects load, `activeProject = projects?.find(p => p.id === selectedProjectId)` returns `undefined` if the stored ID doesn't match any project in the current DB (e.g. after a DB reset or fresh start). Since `selectedProjectId` is non-null, the project picker screen is skipped, and the header falls back to the "Loading..." string.

Fix: Add a `useEffect` that detects when projects are loaded but `selectedProjectId` has no match — then either auto-select the project (if only one exists) or reset `selectedProjectId` to show the picker.

items.title: agenfk up doesn't kill existing server before starting, causing port 3000 conflicts with system install
items.description:
When `agenfk up` runs, it executes `start-services.sh` without first ensuring port 3000 is free. If a stale server (especially from `~/.agenfk-system`) is already listening on 3000, the repo's server either fails silently or races to the port. The system install server serves an empty database, making all projects disappear from the UI.

Fix: Before spawning services in `start-services.sh`, add a port 3000 check and kill any existing process on that port. This ensures a clean start regardless of prior state.

items.title: Implement cycle time in Web UI header and cards
items.description: Implement cycle time display in the Web UI. Show total/average cycle time in the dashboard header and individual cycle time/age on each kanban card. Format as 'Xd Yh'.

items.title: Achieve 80% Code Coverage with Vitest
items.description: Improve code quality and reliability by ensuring at least 80% code coverage across all packages in the AgenFK framework. This involves setting up Vitest as the testing framework and implementing unit/integration tests for each component.
items.implementationPlan:
# Implementation Plan: 80% Code Coverage with Vitest

## Phase 1: Setup
1.  **Install Vitest & Coverage Tools**: Install `vitest` and `@vitest/coverage-v8` in the monorepo root.
2.  **Configure Vitest**: Create a `vitest.config.ts` or `vitest.workspace.ts` to manage all packages.
3.  **Add Test Scripts**: Update the root and individual `package.json` files with `test` and `test:coverage` scripts.

## Phase 2: Unit Testing Core & Storage
1.  **@agenfk/core**: Implement unit tests for all core types and utility functions.
2.  **@agenfk/storage-json**: Implement integration tests for JSON persistence, ensuring atomic operations.

## Phase 3: Testing Server & CLI
1.  **@agenfk/server**: Implement integration tests for the REST API and WebSocket events.
2.  **@agenfk/cli**: Implement unit tests for commands and input handlers, mocking user interaction.

## Phase 4: UI Testing
1.  **ui**: Set up `jsdom` and `@testing-library/react` to test UI components and hooks.

## Phase 5: Verification & Cleanup
1.  **Continuous Coverage**: Verify all packages hit the 80% mark.
2.  **Linting & Style**: Ensure all test files follow project conventions.

items.title: Initial Vitest Setup and Configuration

items.title: Testing @agenfk/server
items.description: Implement integration tests for the Express server's REST API and WebSocket events using supertest and Vitest. Aim for >80% coverage.

items.title: Testing @agenfk/cli
items.description: Implement unit tests for CLI commands and logic in @agenfk/cli. Use Vitest and mock dependencies like axios and inquirer. Aim for >80% coverage.

items.title: Testing @agenfk/ui
items.description: Set up Vitest with JSDOM and React Testing Library for the UI package. Implement tests for components and hooks. Aim for >80% coverage.

items.title: Final Coverage Verification
items.description: Run final coverage reports for the entire monorepo and ensure all packages meet the 80% minimum threshold. Clean up any temporary test assets.

items.title: Finalize storage-json tests and coverage
items.description: Run final coverage for @agenfk/storage-json and ensure all methods are covered. Remove test databases.

items.title: Set up supertest harness for server
items.description: Install supertest and set up a base test harness for @agenfk/server.

items.title: Test Server Projects API
items.description: Implement integration tests for GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /projects endpoints.

items.title: Test Server Items API
items.description: Implement integration tests for GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /items endpoints.

items.title: Test Server WebSocket Events
items.description: Verify WebSocket broadcasting works when state changes via REST.

items.title: Test CLI Core Commands
items.description: Implement unit tests for fundamental CLI commands like `up`, `list`, and `create`. Mock user input.

items.title: Test UI Utils and Hooks
items.description: Implement tests for UI utility functions like cycle time formatting and date helpers. Aim for 100% on these.

items.title: Final Coverage Audit
items.description: Execute `npm run test:coverage` at the root and verify that every package reaches at least 80% coverage. Document results.

items.title: Bug: Gatekeeper fails due to parent status propagation
items.description: The `workflow_gatekeeper` tool in the MCP server currently counts all items with `status: "IN_PROGRESS"`. However, the API server automatically moves parent items (Stories, Epics) to `IN_PROGRESS` whenever a child item is started. This leads to the gatekeeper reporting "AMBIGUOUS WORKFLOW" and blocking work even when only one leaf task is actually being worked on. Fix: Gatekeeper should only count leaf items or filter by type (TASK/BUG).
